tasks.subject: Task 1: Add pure pace() to the window crate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A pure, tested `window::pace(...)` returning used/elapsed fractions + a `used ÷ elapsed` ratio.

**Files:** Modify `crates/window/src/lib.rs`.

**Verify:** `cargo test -p window && cargo clippy -p window --all-targets -- -D warnings`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/window/src/lib.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p window && cargo clippy -p window --all-targets -- -D warnings", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pure pace() with documented signature", "ratio None at elapsed 0; elapsed clamped [0,1]; used not clamped", "tests: ahead/on-track/just-reset/past-reset/over-cap/7d"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add Snapshot.pace + shared glue + --json .pace (predictor still present)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `Snapshot.pace: Vec<WindowPace>` + shared `pace_for_oauth`, populate from compose + coordinator, surface as `--json .pace`. Keep `prediction` so the workspace compiles.

**Files:** `crates/state_coordinator/src/{snapshot.rs,lib.rs,coordinator.rs}`, `crates/snapshot_composer/src/lib.rs`, `crates/balanze_cli/src/json_output.rs`.

**Verify:** `cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/state_coordinator/src/snapshot.rs", "crates/state_coordinator/src/lib.rs", "crates/state_coordinator/src/coordinator.rs", "crates/snapshot_composer/src/lib.rs", "crates/balanze_cli/src/json_output.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Snapshot.pace field + empty() init", "pace_for_oauth shared by compose + coordinator", "--json .pace array present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Retire the predictor crate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove `prediction` from `Snapshot`, delete the `predictor` crate and all references, drop the dead EWMA history ring + `JsonPrediction`.

**Files:** delete `crates/predictor/`; modify `Cargo.toml`, `crates/state_coordinator/{Cargo.toml,src/lib.rs,src/snapshot.rs,src/coordinator.rs}`, `crates/snapshot_composer/src/lib.rs`, `crates/balanze_cli/src/json_output.rs`.

**Verify:** `cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/predictor", "Cargo.toml", "crates/state_coordinator/Cargo.toml", "crates/state_coordinator/src/lib.rs", "crates/state_coordinator/src/snapshot.rs", "crates/state_coordinator/src/coordinator.rs", "crates/snapshot_composer/src/lib.rs", "crates/balanze_cli/src/json_output.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings", "acceptanceCriteria": ["predictor crate deleted + no code references", "Snapshot.prediction removed, no history ring", "workspace compiles"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Reshape the CLI compact view (R1 matrix + pace line)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Compact view obeys the matrix contract — API-$ column real-only (overage or “— not available”); list-price estimate on a separate “Subscription leverage” line; add a `Pace:` line; rewrite the legend.

**Files:** `crates/balanze_cli/src/main.rs` (write_compact, compact_anthropic_cost; add compact_subscription_leverage + compact_pace_line; update compact test).

**Verify:** `cargo test -p balanze_cli && cargo clippy -p balanze_cli --all-targets -- -D warnings`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/balanze_cli/src/main.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p balanze_cli && cargo clippy -p balanze_cli --all-targets -- -D warnings", "acceptanceCriteria": ["API-$ cell real-only (overage or — not available)", "Subscription leverage on its own line", "Pace: line with ratio or —", "legend updated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Reference-doc lockstep (ARCHITECTURE/AGENTS/README/CHANGELOG)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bring precise current-state docs in line with the code: crate map, boundary #2, IPC `.pace`, validation matrix, deleted §10 troubleshooting entry, README `--json` + compact example (drop the “planned R1” caveat), CHANGELOG.

**Files:** `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`, `AGENTS.md`, `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`. Then open the PR (plan Wrap-up).

**Verify:** `rg -n "predictor|Prediction|EWMA" README.md AGENTS.md docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` → only intentional historical mentions remain.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/ARCHITECTURE.md", "AGENTS.md", "README.md", "CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "rg -n \"predictor|Prediction|EWMA\" README.md AGENTS.md docs/ARCHITECTURE.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no predictor/EWMA as current component", "ARCHITECTURE crate map + boundary #2 + IPC .pace", "AGENTS §10 entry deleted", "README R1 caveats removed, --json .pace"]}
```
